caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white short-sleeved shirt, tan suspenders, a small bowtie, glasses, headphones, and a tall, grey, textured wig. He is positioned behind a black microphone. Behind him is a wall filled with framed photographs and a clothing display featuring a mannequin and garments, including a yellow shirt with "LEE" visible on the collar. Overlaid on the scene are two logos: one on the left featuring a microphone and the text "PODCAST" below "ISTALID," and one on the right with the text "GOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST" below it. Across the frames, the man remains in a similar position, though his facial expression shifts slightly from speaking with an open mouth to a more closed, neutral expression, and he tilts his head marginally.
